items.name_en: Model N00198 Denim Blue
items.name_cn:
Model N00198 Denim Blue
This Nevereverfull tote bag presents a distinctive check pattern in Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas, showcasing a chic look with polished metal hardware and leather trim. A zip closure provides ample space, working together with a detachable cotton denim canvas pocket to secure your belongings. Dimensions: 60 x 38 x 23 cm (L x H x W)
- Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas
- Calfskin trim
- Fabric lining
- Hardware
- Double zip closure
- Padlock
- Detachable nameplate
- Interior zip pocket
- Detachable pocket made of cotton denim canvas
- Handles: Double handles
- Made in France, Spain, Italy or the USA

items.name_en: Model: 499623 Black
items.name_cn:
Model: 499623 Black
Size: 25x14x8cm
Gucci Dionysus Diamond-Clasp
True fan favorite, absolutely stunning.
Preserves the perfect lineage of the Dionysus bag,
but ushers in a new era of Dionysus leather!
The most valuable part of the bag is the tiger head diamond clasp.
A treasure item. Not a market item.
Very light, perfect size, highly recommended.

items.name_en: Model: 666713. 💕MCM💕 Visetos Cylindrical Crossbody Bag. The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more exquisite against the backdrop of the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-plated logo tag. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa 🐂 leather and features a double-sided zipper closure. The fabric lining provides ample internal space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried via the top leather handle or the included crossbody strap for increased portability. Strap length is 98 to 114. Dimensions: 16x16x14.

items.name_en: Model: CE331 Coach Baguette STUDIO BAGUETTE. 20cm bottom size, the perfect charming length, and the height is just right for essentials like a phone, lipstick, and keys. Equipped with 2 detachable shoulder straps, an underarm strap and a casual crossbody strap. Classic style, simple silhouette. Solid colors are basic colors, matching any outfit. A versatile all-purpose style.

items.name_en: Model: CH191 Coach HANNA Series. Full of sophistication and exquisite craftsmanship details! The side oil-edge pleated design gives the silhouette a soft yet structured look. The capacity is undeniable, continuing the large-capacity functionality of the traditional bucket bag. Two detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. The entire bag features Monogram PVC material, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.

items.name_en: Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. It is a two-piece set featuring a curved Pea Bag, a crossbody bag, and a shoulder bag. A small coin purse can also serve as an extra pocket. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!

items.name_en: Model: M47132. The Alma backpack makes a striking appearance at the 2024 Spring/Summer Women's show, adding a fashionable new piece to the Alma collection. Classic Monogram canvas paired with various Alma handbag elements, including rounded top handles, dazzling engraved lock, and key pouch. Removable shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options. 15.0 x 20.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Model: M57099, Top-tier replica, Noe Purse, Ruffled Bucket Bag. A highly recommended style this year. It's been compared to the new LV bucket bag—sweet and cute! Beautiful design, good capacity, versatile styling. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder with the strap. Looks great on anyone, guaranteed to turn heads on the street or on a date. A beauty you can't refuse!

items.name_en: Model: M83480 Bucket Bag 💋💋 [Top-tier Original Batch Dynamic New Chip] Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes handbags, merging the former's drawstring with the latter's molded bottom design for a trendy look and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying styles. Monogram coated canvas - calfskin trim - microfiber lining - metal hardware - drawstring closure - fits smartphone, keys, compact wallet, headphones - Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable!!; Dimensions: 14x20.5x14CM
